说明: 林慧茹（日常称林太太）：林志远之妻；温和持家，偶尔来校送东西或参加联谊；与教务线形成「家里那一面」对照。
阵容外貌: 米色风衣、浅灰高领与棕色及膝裙；微卷肩发，温和持家

固化.画风与质量: masterpiece, best quality, very aesthetic, ultra detailed, depth of field, 8k uhd
固化.身材与体态: adult woman, medium breasts, soft waist, mature female body
固化.容貌与发型: asian, gentle brown eyes, dark brown hair, shoulder-length wavy hair, no glasses, fair skin, natural makeup, mature female, 42 years old
固化.气质与年龄感: kind housewife vibe, calm, diplomatic, school staff spouse, aged up, not loli

服装固化._注释: cg.py 按此顺序拼成固定 outfit tags，置于 cg_scene 之前；LLM 严禁在 cg_scene 中重写服装
服装固化.上衣: beige trench coat over light grey turtleneck sweater, modest
服装固化.鞋履: low heel ankle boots, brown leather
服装固化.配饰: gold wedding band, small hoop earrings, leather handbag
服装固化.锁定约束: fully clothed, consistent outfit, same clothes

场景固化._注释: 每张 CG 都会加在 cg_scene 之后，固化画风氛围，不含服装
场景固化.通用: cinematic lighting, film grain, bokeh, professional photography, high detail face, perfect detailed eyes, realistic iris and pupils

负面提示词_通用: lowres, worst quality, low quality, bad anatomy, bad hands, deformed, extra limbs, blurry, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, censored, bar censor, mosaic censor, extra fingers, missing fingers, bad proportions, bad perspective
负面提示词_外貌纠错: blonde hair, blue eyes, green eyes, red eyes, child, loli, shota, toddler face, baby face, teen, petite, muscular female, very old woman, deep wrinkles, grey hair, white hair, bald, heavy goth makeup, twintails, drill hair, 2girls, multiple girls, multiple people, male, man, deformed eyes, weird eyes, crossed eyes, mismatched eyes, blurry eyes, empty eyes, doll eyes, anime eyes, cartoony eyes, plastic eyes
负面提示词_服装纠错: different outfit, outfit change, school uniform, bikini, swimsuit, nude, naked, topless, pantless, jeans, shorts, sportswear, teacher suit tie

版本.变更摘要: 名称改为本名林慧茹；说明补配偶全名
